title: Spot Virtual Node Group
description: A virtual node group (launch specification) defines a set of node configurations within an Ocean cluster, allowing different workloads to run on nodes with specific instance types, labels, and taints.

id.description: The unique identifier of the virtual node group.

name.description: The name of the virtual node group.

oceanId.description: The identifier of the parent Ocean cluster.

imageId.description: The AMI or image ID for instances in this virtual node group.

instanceTypes.description: List of allowed instance types for this virtual node group.

labels.description: Kubernetes labels to apply to nodes in this virtual node group.

taints.description: Kubernetes taints to apply to nodes in this virtual node group.
